candidate_definition_hints.text: A GitHub Action and Azure DevOps Task designed to simplify using Dev Containers (https://containers.dev) in CI/CD systems.

The Dev Container Build and Run GitHub Action is aimed at making it easier to re-use [Dev Containers](https://containers.dev) in a GitHub workflow. The Action supports using a Dev Container to run commands for CI, testing, and more, along with pre-building a Dev Container image.…
